title: Al Pacino
description: An American actor renowned for intense portrayals of mafia and crime figures, including Michael Corleone in The Godfather and Tony Montana in Scarface.

title: Robert De Niro
description: An American actor famous for playing gangsters and mobsters in films like Goodfellas, Casino and The Irishman, often collaborating with Martin Scorsese.

title: Joe Pesci
description: An American actor known for explosive, often comedic-violent mobster roles in Goodfellas, Casino and The Irishman.

title: Leonardo DiCaprio
description: An American actor and producer acclaimed for leading roles in Titanic, Inception, The Wolf of Wall Street and The Revenant.

title: Matt Damon
description: An American actor and screenwriter known for the Bourne series, Good Will Hunting and The Martian.
